calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust By Beneficiary Consent
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Leighton Burrey appeared by zoom for and with Charles Thomas (petitioner) in person.
Janie White (trustee) in propria persona.
Clarence Thomas, Michael Videau, La Narce Thomas, Melissa Higgs, Bertha Ann Thomas (beneficiaries) also present.

The court stated that the petition alleges that all of the beneficiaries consent, that some of the beneficiaries have come forward and are objecting and that Mr. Burrey does not have consent so the petition will be denied. Mr. Burrey presented oral argument to support his petition, and stated that Mrs. White's position is improper and in breach of her fiduciary duties, that he will be seeking removal and asked to court to suspend the trustee. The court stated that there is no alternative theory and that there is nothing before it to suspend anyone. The court will not rule on Mrs. White's requests that were presented in her objections. The Petition for Modification of Trust by Beneficiary Consent is denied.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.
